economic_notes: Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership (100% owned, modified equity method). Great Bear Carbon Credit Limited Partnership (6%). Water Security Project, Gitga'at Power Project, and Marine Emergency Response and Research Facility Project underway with significant capital commitments totaling ~$16.9M. Gitga'at Clean Energy initiative active.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Gitga'at Development Corporation, Gitga'at Land Holdings Ltd., Gitga'at Forestry Inc. (fully consolidated), plus Ocean Destiny Joint Venture (50%) and Kitasoo/Gitga'at Forestry Joint Venture (50%) proportionately consolidated. Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Revenue lines sum exceeds total due to overlap between 'Own source revenue' and other lines — own source revenue line may be a subtotal rather than additive. Government of Canada line of $9,047,389 is unusually large compared to prior year ($10,000) suggesting a large non-recurring federal transfer or settlement in 2024. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. Accumulated surplus per Note 15 shows $96,114,714 vs statement total of $96,228,965 — minor reconciliation difference. Fishing licenses carried at $2,770,000 as purchased intangible assets.
